name: Agent Wallet
description: Plugin-friendly wallet backend for OpenClaw agents with safe wallet tools and runtime instructions.

backend.description: Wallet backend identifier. Current supported value: solana_local.

rpcUrls.description: Optional ordered list of Solana RPC URLs for automatic failover.

network.description: Solana cluster: mainnet, devnet, or testnet.

privateKey.description: Optional signing key material. Prefer environment variables instead of inline secrets.

keypairPath.description: Path to Solana CLI JSON keypair file.

autoCreateWallet.description: Create a local wallet file automatically on first start if none exists.

signOnly.description: If true, the wallet may sign but should not broadcast transactions automatically.

masterKey.description: Master secret for encrypting per-user wallet files. Prefer an environment secret instead of inline config.

encryptUserWallets.description: If true, newly created per-user wallet files are encrypted at rest.

refuseMainnetWalletRecreation.description: If true, refuse to silently create a new mainnet wallet when a pinned address already exists.

jupiterBaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Swap API base URL for quote and swap building.

jupiterUltraBaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Ultra API base URL for managed swap execution.

jupiterPriceBaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Price API base URL for token price lookup.

jupiterPortfolioBaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Portfolio API base URL for Jupiter-specific positions and staking data.

jupiterLendBaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Lend API base URL for Earn read and deposit/withdraw flows.

jupiterApiKey.description: Optional Jupiter API key if your deployment uses a keyed endpoint.
